title: Your Dashboard
description: The Vantage command center — headline numbers, your personal queue, compliance posture, a card per business line, and a live activity feed.

steps.caption: Your command center
steps.narration: Signing in lands you on your command center — your whole compliance picture, at a glance.

steps.caption: What needs you, first
steps.narration: Up top, the headline numbers — critical regulations, reviews waiting on you, overdue obligations, and deadlines this week.

steps.caption: Your personal queue
steps.narration: My queue gathers every review assigned to you, across obligations and documents.

steps.caption: Your compliance posture
steps.narration: A posture score and a status bar show how compliant your obligations are.

steps.caption: Obligations
steps.narration: Every business line gets a card — obligations, broken down by severity and status.

steps.caption: Assets, hottest first
steps.narration: Your assets, with the highest-risk ones — the hot assets — surfaced first.

steps.caption: Company documents
steps.narration: And your documents — what's in review, open comments, and what's due for review.

steps.caption: A live activity feed
steps.narration: A live feed shows what's changed across your workspace — approvals, comments, status moves.

steps.caption: One click into the detail
steps.narration: And every card clicks straight through to the full view.
